  ADD COLUMN paymentAmount INT NULL AFTER opponentRelation,
  ADD COLUMN paymentStatus ENUM('pending','shown','confirmed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' AFTER paymentAmount,
  ADD COLUMN paymentShownAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER paymentStatus,
  ADD COLUMN paymentConfirmedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER paymentShownAt;
